arts.ttl: Post Match Reaction: Sahin and BVB Toss a Win in the Bin
arts.sum: Sahin could not have made it any simpler for Ancelotti and his squad, and the change in shape not only invited pressure but created confusion between players who needed time to understand when to step and when to wait with the presence of a new defender. Borussia Dortmund are as unpredictable right now as they have ever been, so it only made sense for BVB to enter the Bernabeu and play competitive, competent football which earned them a 2-0 lead going into the half.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid superstar planning lifetime stay at Bernabeu in major boost for Los Blancos
arts.sum: Vinicius Junior says that he wants to stay with Real Madrid "forever" after scoring a hat trick in his side's Champions League success over Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid turn to Juventus star in search for Dani Carvajal successor
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly very keen to sign a new right-back in 2025. Dani Carvajal’s season-ending knee injury has led to club bosses fast-tracking their plans to secure a successor, with backup Lucas Vazquez also out of contract at the end of the season. Trent Alexander-Arnold remains Real Madrid’s leading target, although they will likely […] The post Real Madrid turn to Juventus star in search for Dani Carvajal successor appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund star Jamie Bynoe-Gittens breaks a record against Real Madrid
arts.sum: Englishman Jamie Bynoe-Gittens makes history with his goal for Borussia Dortmund against Real Madrid in the Champions League on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid roar back to thump Borussia Dortmund in thrilling Champions League rematch
arts.sum: Holders Real were on course for a second defeat in three matches but Carlo Ancelotti’s men subsequently produced a ruthless second-half response

arts.ttl: Sahin responds to criticism of formation change against Real Madrid
arts.sum: Nuri Sahin has responded to criticism of his substitutions during Borussia Dortmund's 5-2 defeat to Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Player Ratings: Real Madrid 5 - 2 Borussia Dortmund; 2024 UEFA Champions League Group Stage
arts.sum: Played centrally and had a lot more involvement near goal: hit the crossbar and nearly scored with a header from inside the six-yard box after a late-arriving run. Made amends in the second half with the game-winning goal in the 83rd minute to make it 3-2.

arts.ttl: Nmecha frustrated with Dortmund's second-half performance: "We gave the ball away too much"
arts.sum: Felix Nmecha was highly critical of Borussia Dortmund's second half performance against Real Madrid, saying they gave the ball away too much.

arts.ttl: Why Jude Bellingham's Real Madrid form isn't concerning Ancelotti
arts.sum: In a team littered with superstars, Jude Bellingham absorbed the spotlight ahead of Real Madrid’s reunion with Borussia Dortmund in the Champions League. Madrid celebrated their...

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star reveals Carlo Ancelotti’s half-time team talk vs Dortmund
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Vinícius Jr. has late on Tuesday provided an insight into the message sent to he and his teammates at the interval of the club’s meeting with Borussia…
